repo_signals: L3 smoke for hardware.power: clock and power gating, voltage domains, dynamic and static power, IR drop, retention registers, UPF and CPF power intent, power-aware simulation
add a database migration with a unique constraint

retrieval_query: clock gating power gating voltage domain dynamic power leakage power ir drop upf cpf power intent retention register isolation level shifter power aware simulation

validation_smoke.name: hardware.power L3 validation smoke
signals: power-aware simulation drives every power-state transition with isolation and retention behaving correctly
the power-intent file declares isolation and level shifters on every crossing between power domains
retention registers restore the saved state correctly after a power-down and power-up cycle
IR-drop analysis shows the supply stays within the allowed droop across the power grid under peak current

diagnosis_smoke.name: hardware.power diagnosis smoke
signals: functional corruption only after a power-down indicates missing or wrong retention on state registers
X propagation out of a gated domain points to a missing isolation cell on the domain crossing
a level-shifter warning between domains means a voltage crossing lacks the required cell
higher-than-expected static power suggests leakage from an ungated or under-gated always-on region
supply droop on a timing-critical block hints at IR drop from an undersized power grid
